## Claude reuse checklist

- [ ] `claude_prompt` is a single, concrete sentence
- [ ] `tokens.json` (styles only) uses real values, not placeholders
- [ ] At least one working example is included
- [ ] All third-party assets have attribution + license in frontmatter
- [ ] Ran `npx tsx scripts/validate.ts` locally with no errors
- [ ] Ran `npx tsx scripts/build-index.ts` and committed updated `index.json`
